keyFeatures.en: AI-powered music generation with customizable parameters (e.g., mood, genre, length)
keyFeatures.zh: AI驱动的音乐生成，可自定义参数（如情绪、流派、长度）

keyFeatures.en: Royalty-free music for commercial use without attribution requirements
keyFeatures.zh: 免版税音乐，可用于商业用途，无需署名

keyFeatures.en: Loop-based editing and seamless track exporting in multiple formats
keyFeatures.zh: 基于循环的编辑功能，支持多种格式的无缝音轨导出

description.en: Basic access with limited features for personal use
description.zh: 基础功能访问，适用于个人用途，功能有限

description.en: Full access to AI music generation, unlimited downloads, and commercial rights
description.zh: 完全访问AI音乐生成功能，无限下载，拥有商业使用权

description.en: Custom solutions for teams and organizations with advanced needs
description.zh: 为团队和组织提供定制解决方案，满足高级需求

weaknesses.en: Limited control over specific musical elements (e.g., instrument selection, chord progressions) compared to professional DAWs
weaknesses.zh: 与专业数字音频工作站相比，对特定音乐元素（如乐器选择、和弦进行）的控制有限

weaknesses.en: Potential lack of originality in AI-generated tracks, leading to repetitive or generic outputs
weaknesses.zh: AI生成的曲目可能缺乏原创性，导致输出重复或泛化

weaknesses.en: Dependence on internet connectivity for cloud-based generation and access
weaknesses.zh: 依赖互联网连接进行基于云的生成和访问

targetAudience.en: Content creators (e.g., YouTubers, podcasters, streamers), small businesses, and indie developers needing affordable, royalty-free background music
targetAudience.zh: 内容创作者（如YouTuber、播客主播、直播主）、小型企业和独立开发者，需要经济实惠、免版税的背景音乐

positioning.en: An accessible, AI-driven platform for generating custom, royalty-free music quickly and affordably, targeting non-musicians and budget-conscious creators
positioning.zh: 一个易于使用的AI驱动平台，快速且经济地生成定制化免版税音乐，面向非音乐专业人士和预算有限的创作者
